title: Elan Tallah
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Elan Tallah |homeworld=[[Gala]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Galacian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Silver]] |feathers= |eyes=Dark blue |skin=Dark moonlight {{C|dark pale blue}} |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Hill people]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Elan herself is a legend, almost a ghost. I have not managed to find one person who has actually seen her.|[[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]]|''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]''}} '''Elan Tallah''' was a [[Galacian]] leader of the [[hill people]] of [[Gala]]. ==Biography== [[File:Qui-Gon_Mark_of_the_Crown.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Elan was sought by Jedi Master Qui-Gon Jinn]] Elan was the illegitimate heir of the dead [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cana]] of [[Gala]] and [[Tema]] of the [[hill people]], long before Cana married [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]]. Elan led the hill people for much of her life. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] came in search of her, trying to convince her come to [[Galu]] with her people and join the [[Galacian Gubernatorial election, 44 BBY|elections]], in an effort to ensure that [[Wila Prammi]], the one candidate not anti-democratic ([[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Beju]]) or in league with [[Offworld Mining Corporation|Offworld Corporation]] ([[Deca Brun]]), would be chosen. But Elan refused, convinced that Veda had sent him to imprison her or scatter the hill people. However, an attack made by misguided royalist forces under orders from [[Lonnag Giba]], Veda's traitorous leading [[Council Minister]], compelled her to return to the city. Once the elections were over, Elan was shown to be the true heir to the throne as she bore the [[Mark of the Crown]], a mark only detectable in one chamber of the [[Grand Palace of Gala|palace]], and only seen on the true heir. She comforted her half-brother Beju afterwards. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|She's got a soft heart, our Elan.''"
"''And a tough bite.|[[Domi]] and Qui-Gon Jinn|}} Elan was known for her leadership and healing skills, as well as her stubborn but kind personality. She was trained to use a [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] in combat and could pilot a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Elan Tallah |es=Elan Tallah }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tallah, Elan}} [[Category:Beju-Tallah dynasty]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Galacians]] [[Category:Healers and doctors]] [[Category:Swoop racers]]
